human_actions_pending.action: End-of-phase on-device human-verify batch for Phase 2.1
human_actions_pending.context: Two checkpoints deferred per config human_verify_mode=end-of-phase. (1) Plan 02.1-01 Task 3: visual verify of the location label above the temp, temp at y=36, ring cy=30, page dots undisturbed at y=60, truncation behavior on long city names. (2) Plan 02.1-02 will add a similar Task 2 checkpoint for the 60s retry cadence — cold-boot fetch failure should retry ~60s later; first success should revert to 600s; button responsiveness during retry window. Both batch together after Plan 02.1-02 is executed.

session_lessons.lesson: WEATHER-06 and WEATHER-07 IDs already assigned to v2 backlog items — corrected mid-session by renumbering the new v1 additions to WEATHER-08 and WEATHER-09. Reference the corrected IDs in all future Phase 2.1 discussion.
session_lessons.evidence: During Phase 2.1 requirement capture, the initial proposal used WEATHER-06/07. On the grep pass through .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md, both IDs were found already assigned to v2 items (multi-day forecast and user-configurable location override). Renumbered to WEATHER-08/09 with a note in the commit message for the audit trail. STATE.md had one stale reference to '06/07' from an earlier turn that was cleaned up as part of the ROADMAP update.

notable_deviations.topic: Temp y-anchor moved twice during Phase 2 + Phase 2.1 lifecycle
notable_deviations.captured_in_discuss: Phase 2 D-19 permitted planner-discretion tuning of the temp y-anchor
notable_deviations.actual: Phase 2 shipped y=32 (post-verify fix restored the Phase 1 baseline). Phase 2.1 D-26 shifted it to y=36 to make room for the location label above. Ring cy moved 26 → 30 to track.
notable_deviations.impact: Two commits in the ring cy line (376615d, 564c0aa). Layout intent is documented in D-26 rationale; the coord-change chain is git-blameable if a future phase adjusts it again.

next_action: Continue with Plan 02.1-02 (Wave 2) — adds _RETRY_MS = 60_000 module constant to weather_view.py and updates should_refresh(now_ms) to inline-check _cache_status (600s if 'ok' else 60s). Only weather_view.py touched. Two tasks (1 auto + 1 human-verify). See .planning/phases/02.1-location-label-+-fetch-retry/02.1-02-PLAN.md for the full spec.
